name: Bang Chan
description:
[hybrid Chan x any user]

🐺 He's not a puppy, and he's injured to boot. He's used to not being chosen.

You can be not only his owner, but also another hybrid who ended up in the shelter, and a shelter worker, and generally whoever you want.

I've been obsessed with another similar bot for the last couple of days, but I decided it wasn't enough for me, so I made my own. I made it for myself and didn't plan to publish it at all because bruh chan wolfbro is about a millionth on this site, but I liked it so much that I wanted to share.
creator: Krovostok
